ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party's name */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the political party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the current party leader */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., General Election, Local Election) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the election was held */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election type */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available in the election */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is currently ongoing */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated in the election */,
  "results_finalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the results of the election have been finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election in which votes were counted */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party receiving the votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the party */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes that the party received */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes received */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes received */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout for the party */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the party in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election in which the transfer occurred */,
  "from_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party transferring votes */,
  "to_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party receiving votes */,
  "transfer_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes transferred from one party to another */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer of votes */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., preference, surplus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_transfers_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_transfers_to_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_transfers_from_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election relevant to the quota */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party for which the quota is calculated */,
  "quota_value" REAL /* Calculated quota value for the party */,
  "quota_type" TEXT /* Type of quota (e.g., proportional, preferential) */,
  "quota_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the quota */,
  "quota_status" TEXT /* Status of the quota (e.g., met, not met) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotas_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotas_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for additional contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relevant election */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the party in this election */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the results were officially announced */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes received */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes received */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout for the party */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the party in the election */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type (e.g., General, Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the election (e.g., annual, biennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relevant election */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters */,
  "voter_count" INTEGER /* Count of voters in this demographic */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout for the demographic */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes from the demographic */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes from the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party receiving the funding */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., donations, government grants) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the funding was received */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., public, private) */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, received) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign record */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party running the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., digital, door-to-door) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Measured impact of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relevant election */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party being polled */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Date of the poll */,
  "poll_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of support for the party in the poll */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of poll (e.g., opinion, exit) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "pollster" TEXT /* Name of the organization conducting the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)
